rules.description_zh: 轻松休闲和恐怖压迫通常不应同时高权重。
rules.description_en: Relaxed and Horror Tension should usually not both receive high weights.
allowed_when: 游戏存在明显轻松部分和独立恐怖部分
恐怖只是轻度氛围，而整体体验仍偏休闲
rules.validation_hint: If both weights are >= 4, require strong evidence for both.

rules.description_zh: 轻松治愈和恐怖压迫通常是相反体验，不应同时高权重。
rules.description_en: Cozy and Horror Tension usually describe opposite experiences and should not both be high.
allowed_when: 游戏有明显风格混合，并且两种体验都被玩家广泛感知
rules.validation_hint: If both weights are >= 3, require human review.

rules.description_zh: 轻松治愈和竞技对抗通常不应同时高权重。
rules.description_en: Cozy and Competitive usually should not both receive high weights.
allowed_when: 游戏具有轻松视觉或氛围，但核心玩法仍是竞技
游戏有独立的休闲模式和竞技模式
rules.validation_hint: If both weights are >= 4, require strong evidence.

rules.description_zh: 轻松休闲和高难挑战通常不应同时高权重。
rules.description_en: Relaxed and Challenge usually should not both receive high weights.
allowed_when: 游戏有可选高难内容，但基础体验较轻松
游戏同时提供休闲玩法和挑战玩法
rules.validation_hint: If both weights are >= 4, require evidence that both are major experiences.

rules.description_zh: 战斗驱动不等于高难挑战。有大量战斗不代表游戏高难。
rules.description_en: Combat does not imply Challenge. Frequent combat does not necessarily mean the game is difficult.
rules.validation_hint: Only assign challenge if there is evidence of high difficulty, failure pressure, or demanding learning curve.

rules.description_zh: 剧情丰富不等于选择导向。只有玩家选择能影响剧情、关系、任务或结局时，才应使用 choices_matter。
rules.description_en: Story Rich does not imply Choices Matter. Use choices_matter only when player decisions affect story, relationships, missions, or endings.
rules.validation_hint: Do not assign choices_matter without explicit evidence of meaningful consequences.

rules.description_zh: 开放世界强调地图结构，自由探索强调发现未知内容。二者可以同时出现，但不能互相替代。
rules.description_en: Open World describes world structure; Exploration describes discovery-driven experience. They can co-exist but are not the same.
rules.validation_hint: Open world requires an open map structure; exploration requires discovery or hidden content as a meaningful experience.

rules.description_zh: 策略规划强调决策与计划，资源管理强调资源分配与取舍。
rules.description_en: Strategy emphasizes decisions and planning; Resource Management emphasizes allocation and trade-offs.
rules.validation_hint: Assign resource_management only when resources are a meaningful part of success or progression.

rules.description_zh: 流派构筑强调玩法路线差异，角色成长强调角色能力、关系或人物弧光。
rules.description_en: Build Variety describes playstyle and build options; Character Growth describes character progression or personal development.
rules.validation_hint: Do not use character_growth for pure gear/build systems without meaningful character development.

rules.description_zh: 社交模拟不等于多人游戏。社交模拟需要关系经营、好感度、社区互动或人际系统。
rules.description_en: Social Sim does not simply mean multiplayer. It requires relationship management, affection systems, community interaction, or social systems.
rules.validation_hint: Do not assign social_sim merely because a game has online multiplayer.

global_validation_rules.description_zh: 一个游戏不应有过多 5 分核心标签。
global_validation_rules.description_en: A game should not have too many weight-5 core tags.
global_validation_rules.validation_hint: If more than 3 tags have weight 5, require review.

global_validation_rules.description_zh: 每个选中标签必须有至少一个证据片段。
global_validation_rules.description_en: Every selected tag must include at least one evidence snippet.
global_validation_rules.validation_hint: Reject or mark for review if evidence_snippets is empty.

global_validation_rules.description_zh: 单个游戏建议选择 4-6 个主要标签，过少或过多都需要审核。
global_validation_rules.description_en: A game should usually have 4-6 main tags. Too few or too many should be reviewed.
global_validation_rules.validation_hint: If selected tags < 3 or > 7, mark for review.

global_validation_rules.description_zh: 只能选择 GRS 现有标签，不能创建新标签。
global_validation_rules.description_en: Only existing GRS tags may be selected. New tags are not allowed.
global_validation_rules.validation_hint: Reject any tag_code not found in tag_definitions.
